rulings.Case Title: MARK A MENDAROS VS. JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, SUCCESS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 27, 2016, line 2. Demurrer To Second Amended Complaint SUSTAINED with a final leave to amend to allege all elements of this cause of action in light of CC 2923.6(c); CC 2923.6(g); Withers v. JP Morgan Chase Bank 2014 WL 3418367; Williams v. Wells Fargo Bank. Third amended Complaint shall be filed and served within 10 days of notice of entry of order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NEW HORIZON CONSULTING, INC. VS. AURORA MARTINEZ SANGIL ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 27, 2016, line 9. DEFENDANTS AURORA SANGIL and SANTIAGO SANGIL's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend based on uncertainty for Plaintiff to clarify/reconcile the discrepancies, including but not limited to (1) allegations in paragraph 6(a), attachment 15 and Ex. 4; (2) allegations in paragraph 7(a) and Ex. 2; (3) allegations in paragraph 6(a) and 8(b), etc. = (501/REQ)
